title: SpiderSense
description: SpiderSense - Minecraft mod that enhances the player's perception by providing visual and informational clues about nearby mobs. It is designed to help players detect and track hostile creatures. Fully operational on servers.
body:
SpiderSense - mod for Minecraft that enhances the player's perception by providing visual and informational clues about nearby mobs. It is designed to help players detect and track hostile creatures, which is especially useful in dark or difficult environments.
When a hostile mob appears in your field of vision, your spider sense is triggered.
